Part.Source:
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1,'infCte') If &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.infCte.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão EndIf &XmlReader.Close()
//PROTOCOLO Do 'protCTe' //QRCode do 'QrCode'
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'infCte') if &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.Id = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('Id') //Id Cte &XmlReader.Read()
// LEITURA XML Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCTe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ide' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'ide' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'compl' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'compl' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'emit' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'emit' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'rem' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'rem' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'exped' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'exped' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'receb' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'receb' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dest' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'dest' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vPrest' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'vPrest' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCTeNorm' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCTeNorm' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCarga' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'infCarga' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infDoc' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'infDoc' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'docAnt' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'docAnt' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'seg' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'seg' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infModal' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'infModal' Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cobr' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'cobr' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif Enddo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'imp' &XmlReader.Read() //Avanca para o primeiro campo da tag... Do 'imp'
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infCteComp' &XmlReader.Read() Do 'Comp' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //infNFe EndIf
&XmlReader.close()
//PROTOCOLO Sub 'protCTe' &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&CteArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'protCTe') if &ret <> 0 &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'protCTe' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infProt' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infProt' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verAplic' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.verAplic = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhRecbto' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.dhRecbto = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProt' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.nProt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'digVal' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.digVal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cStat' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.cStat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMotivo' &SdtXmlCte.protCTe.infProt.xMotivo = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> endif &XmlReader.Close() EndSub
//IDENTIFICACAO Sub 'ide' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ide' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUF' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cUF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cCT' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cCT = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CFOP' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.CFOP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'natOp' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.natOp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'forPag' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.forPag = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.mod.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nCT' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.nCT = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhEmi' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.dhEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpImp' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpImp = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpEmis' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpEmis = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cDV' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cDV = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpAmb = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpCTe' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpCTe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'procEmi' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.procEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'verProc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.verProc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indGlobalizado' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.indGlobalizado = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFEnv' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFEnv = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'modal' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.modal = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpServ' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.tpServ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFIni' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFIni = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMunFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.cMunFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMunFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.xMunFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UFFim' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.UFFim = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'retira' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.retira = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indIEToma' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.indIEToma = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'toma' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma03.toma = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'toma4' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'toma4' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'toma' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.toma = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xFant' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.xFant = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderToma' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderToma' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.UF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.ide.toma04.enderToma.xPais = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'compl'
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'compl' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCaracAd' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xCaracAd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCaracSer' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xCaracSer = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'origCalc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.origCalc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'destCalc' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.destCalc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xObs' &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.xobs = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ObsCont' &SdtXmlCteContt = new() &SdtXmlCteContt.xCampo = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('xCampo') &XmlReader.Read()
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ObsCont'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xTexto' &SdtXmlCteContt.xTexto = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo &SdtXmlCte.InfCte.compl.ObsContt.Add(&SdtXmlCteContt) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
//EMITENTE Sub 'emit' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'emit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xFant' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.xFant = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderEmit' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderEmit' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.emit.enderEmit.fone = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//DESTINATARIO Sub 'dest' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'dest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.fone = &XmlReader.Value
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderDest' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderDest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.enderDest.xPais = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.IE = &XmlReader.Value // Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ISUF' // &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.ISUF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.dest.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//REMETENTE Sub 'rem' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'rem' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderReme' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderReme' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.enderReme.xPais = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.rem.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'exped' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'exped' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderExped' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderExped' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.enderExped.xPais = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.exped.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'receb' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'receb' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CPF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.CPF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fone' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.fone = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'enderReceb' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'enderReceb' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xLgr' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xLgr = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.nro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCpl' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xCpl = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xBairro' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xBairro = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMun' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xMun = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.UF.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CEP' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.CEP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.cPais = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xPais' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.enderReceb.xPais = &XmlReader.Value
EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'email' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.receb.email = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
//PRESTAÇÃO Sub 'vPrest' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'vPrest' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vTPrest' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.vPrest.vTPrest = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vRec' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.VPrest.vRec = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'Comp' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteComp = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'Comp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCteComp.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vComp' &SdtXmlCteComp.vComp = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.VPrest.Compp.Add(&SdtXmlCteComp) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'imp' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'imp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMSSN' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMSSN' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'indSN' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMSSN.indSN = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMSSN> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS45' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS45' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS45.CST = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS45> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS00' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS00' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS00.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS00> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS20' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS20' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pRedBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pRedBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS20.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS20> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS60' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS60' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBCSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vBCSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMSSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vICMSSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMSSTRet' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.pICMSSTRet = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCred' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS60.vCred = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() If &XmlReader.EOF Exit EndIf
EndDo //</ICMS60> Case &XmlReader.Name = 'ICMS90' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'ICMS90' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CST' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.CST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pRedBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pRedBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'pICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.pICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCred' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.Imp.ICMS.ICMS90.vCred = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</ICMS90> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</ICMS> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'infCarga'
Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCarga' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCarga' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.vCarga = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'proPred' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.proPred = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xOutCat' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.xOutCat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infQ' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteInfQ = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infQ'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cUnid' &SdtXmlCteInfQ.cUnid = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpMed' &SdtXmlCteInfQ.tpMed = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'qCarga' &SdtXmlCteInfQ.qCarga = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infCarga.infQI.Add(&SdtXmlCteInfQ) EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'infDoc' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infDoc' Do case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infNFe' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infNFe' &SdtXmlCteInfNfe = new() Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chave' &SdtXmlCteInfNfe.chave = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFee.Add(&SdtXmlCteInfNfe)
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infNF' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteInfNf = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infNF'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nRoma' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.nRoma = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nPed' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.nPed = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'mod' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.mod = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'serie' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.serie = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nDoc' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.nDoc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dEmi' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.dEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBC' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vBC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vICMS' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vICMS = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vBCST' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vBCST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vST' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vST = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vProd' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vProd = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vNF' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.vNF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nCFOP' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.nCFOP = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nPeso' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.nPeso = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'PIN' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.PIN = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dPrev' &SdtXmlCteInfNf.dPrev = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infNFF.Add(&SdtXmlCteInfNf)
Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infOutros' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteInfOutros = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infOutros'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpDoc' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.tpDoc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'descOutros' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.descOutros = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nDoc' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.nDoc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dEmi' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.dEmi = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vDocFisc' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.vDocFisc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dPrev' &SdtXmlCteInfOutros.dPrev = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() If &XmlReader.EOF Exit EndIf EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infDoc.infOutross.Add(&SdtXmlCteInfOutros)
EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'docAnt' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'docAnt' Do case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'emiDocAnt' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCtedocAnt = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'emiDocAnt'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'CNPJ' &SdtXmlCtedocAnt.CNPJ = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'IE' &SdtXmlCtedocAnt.IE = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCtedocAnt.UF = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xNome' &SdtXmlCtedocAnt.xNome = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'idDocAnt' &XmlReader.Read() do 'idDocAnt' EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.docAnt.emiDocAntt.Add(&SdtXmlCtedocAnt) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo EndSub
Sub 'idDocAnt' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'idDocAnt' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'idDocAntEle' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'idDocAntEle' &SdtXmlCteIDdocAnt = new() Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &SdtXmlCteIDdocAnt.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo &SdtXmlCtedocAnt.idDocAnt.idDocAntElee.Add(&SdtXmlCteIDdocAnt) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
SUB 'Seg' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'seg' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'respSeg' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.respSeg = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xSeg' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.xSeg = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nApol' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.nApol = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nAver' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.nAver = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vCarga' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.seg.vCarga = &XmlReader.Value Endcase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'infModal' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infModal' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'rodo' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'rodo' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RNTRC' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.RNTRC = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dPrev' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.dPrev = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'lota' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.lota = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'veic' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteVeicc = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'veic'
Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'placa' &SdtXmlCteVeicc.placa = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'RENAVAM' &SdtXmlCteVeicc.RENAVAM = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tara' &SdtXmlCteVeicc.tara = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpVeic' &SdtXmlCteVeicc.tpVeic = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'UF' &SdtXmlCteVeicc.UF = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo
&SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.infModal.rodo.veicc.Add(&SdtXmlCteVeicc) EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Endcase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'cobr' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'cobr' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'fat' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'fat' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nFat' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.cobr.fat.nFat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vOrig' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.cobr.fat.vOrig = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vLiq' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.cobr.fat.vLiq = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dup' &XmlReader.Read() &SdtXmlCteDupp = new() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'dup' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nDup' &SdtXmlCteDupp.nDup = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dVenc' &SdtXmlCteDupp.dVenc = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'vDup' &SdtXmlCteDupp.vDup = &XmlReader.Value Endcase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo
&SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCTeNorm.cobr.dup.Add(&SdtXmlCteDupp) Endcase
&XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
Sub 'Comp' Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infCteComp' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chCTe' &SdtXmlCte.infCte.infCteComp.chCTe = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo EndSub
sub 'QrCode' &auxCteArqXml = &CteArqXml.ToString() &Inicio = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('<![CDATA[', 1) &Fim = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf(']]>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0 &Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxCteArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<![CDATA[', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace(']]>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&SdtXmlCte.protCTe.qrcode = &valqrCode
Else &Inicio = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('<qrCodCTe>', 1) &Fim = &auxCteArqXml.IndexOf('</qrCodCTe>', 2) if &Inicio <> 0 and &Fim <> 0
&Tamanho = &Fim - &Inicio //&Tamanho += 1 &VarChar = &auxCteArqXml.Substring(&Inicio, &Tamanho) &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('<qrCodCTe>', '') &VarChar = &VarChar.Replace('</qrCodCTe>', '')
&VarChar = trim(&VarChar) &valqrCode = gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 1, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 2, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 3, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 4, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 5, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 6, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 7, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 8, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 9, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 10, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 11, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 12, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 13, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 14, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 15, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 16, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 17, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 18, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 19, 100) &valqrCode = trim(&valqrCode) + gxGetMLi(&VarChar, 20, 100)
&SdtXmlCte.protCTe.qrcode = &valqrCode
Endif EndIF EndSub
